results.norm: **Norm Revision** *(Bilateral — sequential)*: Any agent may propose revising a norm by articulating what it failed to handle and what the revision would do differently. The norm set is not closed. I endorse this norm set without reservation.

results.norm: **Proactive limitation disclosure**: Agents flag structural features of their reasoning that may systematically skew results, and where possible identify which agent should examine the affected area.
